entry.title: Packrift MCP Server
entry.description: Packrift MCP Server exposes Packrift's packaging-supplies catalog through a remote MCP endpoint. It lets AI agents search packaging products, retrieve pricing and inventory context, and create cart URLs for ecommerce packaging workflows. Use it when an agent needs packaging-supply discovery, carton or mailer selection, or cart-building support.
entry.seoTitle: Packrift MCP Server - MCP Servers for Claude
entry.seoDescription: Remote MCP server for Packrift packaging catalog search, pricing and inventory context, and ecommerce cart URL creation.
entry.author: Packrift
entry.cardDescription: Remote MCP server for Packrift packaging catalog search, pricing and inventory context, and ecommerce cart URL creation.
entry.installCommand: No local install package is required for the hosted endpoint. Configure the remote MCP URL: https://mcp.packrift.com/mcp

sections.title: Overview
sections.markdown: Packrift MCP Server exposes Packrift's packaging-supplies catalog through a remote MCP endpoint. It lets AI agents search packaging products, retrieve pricing and inventory context, and create cart URLs for ecommerce packaging workflows. Use it when an agent needs packaging-supply discovery, carton or mailer selection, or cart-building support.
